title: Bitwarden token rotation silently reuses expired session — undocumented footgun
description: BitwardenBackend uses OnceCell for the authenticated client. If BWS_ACCESS_TOKEN is rotated after first use, all subsequent calls use the expired session until the backend is dropped and recreated. The behavior is not documented in from_uri, only discoverable by reading the implementation. A contributor adding a 'refresh credentials' feature will need to understand this constraint. Add a doc comment on the struct noting that token rotation requires creating a new backend instance.
